case_title: ADRU CORPORATION VS. VENYSTATE, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-19-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. THE CASE WAS CONSOLIDATED WITH CGC-07-465599. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADRU CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT VENYSTATE, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-19-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-21-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-04-2008

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS. THE COURT AGREES TO RETAIN JURISDICTION OF THE CONSOLIDATED ACTIONS TO ENFORCE THE PARTIES' ARBITRATION AGREEMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE ON REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL FILED BY DEFENDANT VENYSTATE, INC.
